data.name: Office Sex
data.detailed_description:
A long and immersive adult visual novel about an ambitious young woman willing to do whatever it takes to land a job in a prestigious office building and become the boss’s favorite.

GAME DESCRIPTION 

Gigi steps shyly into the luxurious office building, imagining how her life might change if she lands a  job in such a place.

Things take an unexpected turn when she meets Pamela, the boss’s assistant, who offers a few tips before the interview and then casually unbuttons her shirt, leaving her outfit noticeably more revealing.

Inside the executive office, Mr. Forte is impressed by her resume, but it quickly becomes clear that the position he’s offering may require more than what’s written in the job description.

Is Gigi ready to play by his rules? 
Follow her journey and discover how each character becomes part of her decisions… and her desires.

THE CHARACTERS:
   
Gigi - Shy… or surprisingly slutty 

Mr. Forte - The C.E.O.

Pamela - The assistant

Hendrick - Business partner

Pizza Guy - Unexpected distraction

James - Gigi’s boyfriend 

Vanessa and Daniel Thompson - Board members

FEATURES:  

- 500+ renders
- 30+ animations 
- Long story (aprox 4 hours), divided among several mini episodes which you can replay anytime.
- HD renders and animations

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
